About me

UpWork

I have spent around 2-3 last years coding and doing basic practices related to api requesting data (basic) and implementing in different enviroments like web pages or desktop programs (more pages) but this just at introductory level, i like to expand my knowledge and skills by working on more complex projects or websites, i could develop a react application (having an up-date host service) and use chat-gpt bug fixes releases to solve only version errors.

  • PROS: I like to code in javascript using light-weight environments and memory consumption, if the tasks where i am asinged does not fit to my abilities i would be motivated to explore and achieve my goals :)

  • CONS: Not available for high-memory consumption tasks, just basic developer experience (beginner works and beginner algorithm optimization only brute force acceptable entrys) also i can’t have a full interaction real streaming communication thanks you guys reading my request


Linkedin

I have the ability/basic knowledge to develop programs and web applications to run them in the cloud in a simple way and I would like to work on large projects that involve different skills such as interface design, optimization and automation of different processes as much as if I were a back-end or front-end developer and thus gain more experience and knowledge to contact different companies.




Programming stuff

Python

I have a basic knowledge about python programming and i also have coded small programs and web apps, i am interested in desktop and GUI programs and learn to introduce more complex algorithms.

JavaScript

Related to other languages i have worked on some web application related to back-end using node.js but just limit to basic tasks.

C++

Like any other complex programming languajge i think i could learn to write small apps using pointers, shared_pointers, data type casting, etc … I have very restricted to code in c++ for different reasons or just because is bored to me, but i would feel motivated to work on any project.

databases (closely and unmantained title)

Almost a litte part of my work i have dedicated to databases just a few small statements executed using django-sql and store some fils in the cloud-firebase-service.
